steps.s1: Choose Google, email/password, or demo access.
signup.title: Create your VisaClear account
signup.subtitle: Register with email/password, use Google, or continue with the demo account.
login.title: Create or access your account
login.subtitle: Use the demo account for now, or start the real auth flow when the external provider is ready.
active.title: Account access is active
active.body: Continue to your dashboard to manage checklists, reminders, profile settings, and checkout.
